word: H7523 - רָצַח - râtsach - raw-tsakh' - Put to death

sections.paragraph:
Original: רצח

Transliteration: râtsach

Phonetic: raw-tsakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to murder, slay, kill
    1. (Qal) to murder, slay
      1. premeditated
      2. accidental
      3. as avenger
      4. slayer (intentional) (participle)
    2. (Niphal) to be slain
    3. (Piel)
      1. to murder, assassinate
      2. murderer, assassin (participle) (substantive)
    4. (Pual) to be killed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2208

Part(s) of speech: Verb
